steps.title: Recognize that f(x) = 39 is a constant function
steps.content: The function $f(x) = 39$ outputs the same value—39—for every input $x$. This is a constant linear function.

steps.title: Identify which table shows f(x) = 39 for all x values
steps.content:
Scan the tables for one where every $f(x)$ entry is 39:
  • Choice A: All outputs are 0
  • Choice B: All outputs are 39 ✓
  • Choice C: Outputs are 0, 39, 78
  • Choice D: Outputs are 39, 0, −39
Only choice B matches $f(x) = 39$ for every input shown. That matches choice B — B is correct.
